ideation: This animation sequence simulates the arm movements of a woman running.  The arms will swing naturally opposite each other, creating a rhythmic motion.  Because our robot has no elbows, the arm will swing in a straight line, creating a stylized running pose.  We'll focus on creating a sense of forward momentum and energy. Frame 1 will show the arms at the start of a swing, frame 2 mid-swing, frame 3 the opposite swing, and frame 4 completing the cycle.

frames.beat: arms swing back and forth like running
left arm swings forward, right arm back
arms swing back, completing the running stride
